title: cleisostoma muticum
intro: Cleisostoma muticum, also known as the 'yellow cleisostoma', is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and parts of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma muticum include its ability to treat various ailments such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
